news.headline: Tata Power announces financial results for FY 2025-26

news.headline: CleanMax announces financial results for FY 2025-26

news.headline: NTPC awards 500 MW solar BoS contracts to KPI Green Energy

news.headline: Rezolv Energy commissions 225 MW solar park in Bulgaria
news.summary: Rezolv Energy has commissioned the 225 MW St. George solar park in Silistra, Bulgaria. The project represents an investment of $300 million. The project incorporates 400,000 solar panels along with a 90 MW/240 MWh battery

news.headline: FH Capital acquires majority stake in JinkoSolar US subsidiary

news.headline: Grenergy secures $268 million for solar plus storage project in Chile

news.headline: NTPC floats module supply tender for 1.2 GW solar projects in Gujarat
news.summary: NTPC Renewable Energy Limited (NTPC REL), a wholly-owned subsidiary of NTPC Green Energy Limited, has invited bids for the supply of solar photovoltaic (PV) modules for 1,200 MW solar projects at Khavda Renewable Energy Park-South

news.headline: IndiGrid commissions 180 MW/360 MWh BESS project in Gujarat
